scenarios.label: Fraud — P2P payment
scenarios.description: LLM agent checks SIM swap, device swap, call forwarding, and roaming to assess fraud risk on a mobile money transfer.

scenarios.label: Fraud — high-value transfer
scenarios.description: High-value transfer triggers deeper LLM reasoning. Expect VERIFY or BLOCK if multiple risk signals fire.

scenarios.label: Onboarding — new user registration
scenarios.description: LLM agent verifies number legitimacy, checks for recycled numbers, and runs KYC match before allowing registration.

scenarios.label: Onboarding — policy mode
scenarios.description: Same onboarding signals but decision deferred to your tenant rules. Compare against agent outcome.

scenarios.label: Emergency dispatch
scenarios.description: LLM checks reachability, QoS, and congestion. Safety-first — never blocks; prioritizes on weak network.

scenarios.label: Mobility — ride-hailing
scenarios.description: LLM evaluates QoS, location, reachability, and roaming to approve or degrade a ride-hailing session.

scenarios.label: Telehealth session
scenarios.description: LLM checks network quality and subscriber identity before authorising a remote video consultation.

scenarios.label: Agri field sensor
scenarios.description: LLM validates connectivity and basic identity for an IoT soil sensor ping.

scenarios.label: Finance — loan application
scenarios.description: LLM runs KYC match, tenure, SIM swap, call forwarding, and number recycling before approving a loan request.

scenarios.label: Insurance — policy application
scenarios.description: LLM verifies KYC, age, and location consistency before binding an insurance policy.

scenarios.label: E-commerce — checkout fraud
scenarios.description: LLM checks SIM swap, device swap, and number recycling to screen a high-risk e-commerce checkout.

scenarios.label: Logistics — delivery tracking
scenarios.description: LLM verifies location, QoS, and reachability to approve a last-mile delivery confirmation.

scenarios.label: Education — student verification
scenarios.description: LLM runs number verification, KYC match, and tenure to confirm a student's identity before exam access.
